query:
SELECT 
  mb.id,
  mb.boardNumber,
  mb.supplierId,
  ms.name as supplier_name
FROM material_boards mb
LEFT JOIN material_suppliers ms ON mb.supplierId = ms.id
WHERE mb.boardNumber = 'C03';
command:
